action_text: Click the chart options/menu button (likely “Show data” or similar) for the report chart
rationale: Viewing the chart’s data table would list each agent with their exact incident counts, making it easy to identify the minimum and all agents at that value.

action_text: Hover over a small bar near the right end of the chart to reveal its tooltip
rationale: Hovering a very small bar near the right end should display a tooltip with the agent name and exact count, helping determine the minimum.

action_text: Hover over the next small bar to the left to read its tooltip
rationale: Checking the adjacent small bar ensures we capture if multiple agents share the minimum count.

action_text: Hover over another small bar toward the right to read its tooltip
rationale: Further hovering another nearby small bar increases chances of finding and confirming the absolute minimum and duplicates at that value.

action_text: Click a small bar near the right end to drill down into that agent’s incidents
rationale: Clicking a tiny bar can drill down to the incidents for that agent, revealing the agent name and allowing confirmation of the count.
